other_observers: Mark Yaeger this bird on May 20, 2019.  I saw the bird with Bill Maynard on May 21, 2019.
description: Bill Maynard and I were looking at tanagers in a tree, when I spotted this tanager, with dark bill, dark ear patches, and dark flanks.  See Bill Maynard's photos.  Mark Yaeger found the bird yesterday, the 20 of May, so we were looking for it, and hoping to find it and photographed it, since it is a review species for Pueblo County.  Only my 3rd in the county.
